creator: till@php.net
text:
On Wed, Apr 15, 2009 at 3:01 PM, Wesley Shields <wxs@freebsd.org> wrote:
> On Wed, Apr 15, 2009 at 11:00:10AM +0000, till wrote:
>> The following reply was made to PR ports/131611; it has been noted by GN=
ATS.
>>
>> From: till <till@php.net>
>> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
>> Cc:
>> Subject: RE: ports/131611: Updates to database/couchdb
>> Date: Wed, 15 Apr 2009 12:25:21 +0200
>>
>> =A0Hey Wesley,
>>
>> =A0is your erlang-lite still broken? I haven't heard back from you.
>
> Yes, sorry. =A0I forgot about this one.
>
>> =A0There's a new 0.9.0 release of CouchDB and I'd (attempt to) do anothe=
r
>> =A0patch, but you wanted to tell me what I should improve first.
>>
>> =A0This is the new release:
>> =A0http://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.cgi?path=3D/couchdb/0.9.0/apache-cou=
chdb-0.9.0.tar.gz
>>
>> =A0This is pretty urgent now.
>>
>> =A0Do you think we can get to it this week?
>
> No, we are in a freeze right now. =A0The update will have to wait until
> the freeze is over. =A0I will, however, make sure to work on it so it is
> ready for when the freeze is over.
>
> -- WXS
>

Ok, sweet. I'd like to test this ASAP though, so if you had a patch,
I'd try it out.

Thanks,
Till
